NGIS PHASE 3 — WEEKLY STATUS REPORT
Reporting Period: February 24 – March 3, 2026
Report Date: March 3, 2026
Project Manager: Alice Tran
Project ID: NGIS-P3-2024-001
Overall Status: GREEN

---

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY

The NGIS Phase 3 data centre consolidation project continues to progress
according to plan. The team has completed the Active Directory migration
for the test environment and finalized network topology designs for Sites
B and C. No risks are identified at this time.

---

ACCOMPLISHMENT
